headline: Mondelez’s First-Quarter Profit Jump Could Be A Game Changer For Mondelez International (MDLZ)
summary: Mondelez International reported past first-quarter 2026 results showing sales of US$10.08 billion and net income of US$560 million, with earnings per share from continuing operations rising to US$0.44 from US$0.31 a year earlier. These stronger-than-expected earnings, alongside management’s emphasis on resilient performance amid macro volatility, have sharpened investor focus on how effectively Mondelez’s strategy is translating into profit growth. Now we’ll examine how this earnings...
